items.description: Percentage indicator of the state of charge of the battery (100% = full, 0% = empty, -1 = unknown)

beaconBasicProperties.description: Basic information of a single beacon that is unlikely to change over time

beaconStatusInfo.description: Status information of a single beacon

active.title: Is active
active.description: Whether the beacon is currently active (operational). May be omitted for passive beacons or points of interest.

heading.title: Heading
heading.description: The heading of the beacon in the local tangent plane, in 1/10th of degrees, if known

timestamp.title: Last updated at
timestamp.description: Timestamp that denotes when the status of the beacon was updated the last time

commandResponse.description: Response given by a UAV to a command request

deviceTreePath.title: Device tree path

duration.description: The total duration of the show, in seconds. Not mandatory.

color.description: Color of the light effect in RGB notations. Values in the array must be between 0 and 255, inclusive.

color.title: Color
color.description: The solid color to use, according to the CSS3 Color Module Level 3 specification (named strings, hex strings, and RGB tuples are accepted)

color.description: The spark color, according to the CSS3 Color Module Level 3 specification (named strings, hex strings, and RGB tuples are accepted)

preflightCheckResult.description: Result of the preflight check or a single item in a preflight checklist

items.description: X component of the vector, in mm

items.title: Y component
items.description: Y component of the vector, in mm

items.title: Z component
items.description: Z component of the vector, in mm

progress.title: Progress information
progress.description: Progress of some operation being executed on a UAV

receiptIdList.title: Receipt IDs
receiptIdList.description: IDs of the receipts that the message refers to

rssi.title: RSSI
rssi.description: Received signal strength indicator, for each of the channels the UAV is accessible on

rthTransformationParameters.title: RTH transformation parameters
rthTransformationParameters.description: Parameters for adapting the RTH (return-to-home) segment of the drone show

method.description: The RTH method to use. Accepted values: 'plain' (brings the drones to the possibly layered floating grid of the end of their takeoff positions with a collectively optimal transition, _not_ preserving individual home positions. A final integrated land phase follows), 'smart' (brings the drones to their individual home positions, while avoiding drones being closer to each other than the minimum distance threshold thoughout the entire RTH and its final integrated land phase). Default: 'smart'

lights.description: Light effect configuration for the drones during RTH, or a brightness value in the [0, 1] interval to use with the default light configuration

min_distance.description: Minimum distance to keep between drones during RTH, in meters. If not specified, the configured validation setting will be used.

velocity_xy.description: The horizontal RTH speed to use, in m/s. Default value is 5 m/s.

velocity_z.description: The vertical RTH and land speed to use, in m/s. Default value is 2 m/s.

altitude.description: The altitude of the smart RTH from where vertical land is called, in meters. If not specified, the minimum navigation altitude will be used as a default.

replace.description: Whether to replace the existing RTH and land segment if the show segment is defined. Default: false

title.title: Title
title.description: A human-readable title of the preset

type.title: Type
type.description: The type of the preset (built-in, created automatically or added by the user)

format.title: Message format
format.description: Format of the GPS messages arriving in this configuration

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: List of source connections where this preset collects messages from

rtkPresetIdList.title: RTK Preset IDs
rtkPresetIdList.description: IDs of the RTK presets that the message refers to

rtkPresetSource.title: RTK preset source
rtkPresetSource.description: Identifier of an RTK source connection

accuracy.title: Survey accuracy
accuracy.description: Expected RTK survey position accuracy in meters

gnssTypes.title: GNSS types
gnssTypes.desciption: GNSS types to use for RTK corrections

satelliteCNRs.title: RTK Satellite CNRs
satelliteCNRs.description: RTK satellite carrier-to-noise ratios in dB

servicePortMap.title: Service port map
servicePortMap.description: Mapping of services offered by the server to the corresponding ports

accuracy.title: Survey accuracy
accuracy.description: RTK survey position accuracy in meters

flags.title: Survey flags
flags.description: RTK survey status flags (0: unknown, 1: supported, 2: active, 4: valid)

shiftTransformationParameters.title: Shift transformation parameters
shiftTransformationParameters.description: Parameters for shifting the altitude of the show segment

z.description: Vertical shift to apply to the show segment, in meters

authorized.description: Whether the server has received authorization from a human operator to start the show

clock.desciption: Identifier of the clock that the start time refers to; null means that the start time is a UNIX timestamp

time.description: Timestamp when the drone show should start

uavIds.description: Array containing the IDs of the UAVs that should be started automatically

takeoffTransformationParameters.title: Takeoff transformation parameters
takeoffTransformationParameters.description: Parameters for adapting the takeoff segment of the drone show

positions.description: Explicit takeoff positions to use, as [x, y, z] coordinates in meters relative to the show origin. If empty, original takeoff positions of drones will be used instead.

duration.description: Optional overall duration of the transformation to set, in seconds

method.description: The takeoff method to use. Accepted values: 'layered' (takeoff to a floating grid from original takeoff positions or explicit positions provided, then morph to the first formation of the show), 'organic' (takeoff with a reversed smart RTH procedure, that provides an organic look and also preserves mapping between takeoff and formation positions). If not specified, it will be inferred from other parameters.

lights.description: Light effect configuration for the drones during takeoff, or a brightness value in the [0, 1] interval to use with the default light configuration

min_distance.description: Minimum distance to keep between drones during multi-layer takeoff and transition to the first formation, in meters. If not specified, the configured validation setting will be used.

velocity_xy.description: The horizontal speed to use towards the first formation, in m/s. Default is 5 m/s.

velocity_z.description: The vertical speed to use during takeoff and towards the first formation, in m/s. Default value is 1.5 m/s.

altitude.description: The takeoff height of the last (lowest) layer before any horizontal motion is planned, in meters. Default value is 10 m/s.

replace.description: Whether to replace the existing takeoff segment if the show segment is defined. Default: false

timeSyncSnapshot.title: Time sync snapshot
timeSyncSnapshot.description: Snapshot of the time synchronization state of the server clock

state.description: Current estimate of whether the server clock is synchronized to the world clock

offset.description: Offset between the server clock and the world clock, in seconds

source.description: Identifier of the time source used to determine the offset

jitter.description: Jitter of the time source used to determine the offset

timeAxisScheduleSegment.title: Time axis schedule segment
timeAxisScheduleSegment.description: A single segment of the time axis schedule of a show

type.description: Type of the time axis segment

startMs.description: Start time of the segment in milliseconds since the Unix epoch

endMs.description: End time of the segment in milliseconds since the Unix epoch, 'auto' if not yet calculated, or 'inf' if the segment runs indefinitely

timeAxisSchedule.title: Time axis schedule
timeAxisSchedule.description: Time axis schedule of a show, consisting of a list of segments (typically from the future only)

transportOptions.title: Transport options
transportOptions.description: Additional preferences about how the message should be delivered to UAVs

channel.title: Channel
channel.description: Index of the communication channel to use

broadcast.title: Broadcast allowed?
broadcast.description: Stores whether the server is allowed to use a broadcast message

ignoreIds.title: Ignore IDs
ignoreIds.description: Whether to broadcast the message to all UAVs, ignoring the explicit UAV IDs in the command

uavIdList.title: UAV IDs
uavIdList.description: IDs of the UAVs that the message refers to

uavStatusInfo.title: UAV status info
uavStatusInfo.description: Status information of a single UAV

mode.title: Flight mode
mode.description: The flight mode of the UAV

heading.title: Heading
heading.description: The heading of the UAV in the local tangent plane, in 1/10th of degrees

timestamp.title: Last updated at
timestamp.description: Timestamp that denotes when the status of the UAV was updated the last time

velocityNED.title: Velocity (NED)
velocityNED.description: Velocity in the NED coordinate system

items.title: North component
items.description: North component of the vector, in mm/s

items.title: East component
items.description: East component of the vector, in mm/s

items.title: Down component
items.description: Down component of the vector, in mm/s

velocityXYZ.description: Velocity in a local right-handed XYZ coordinate system

items.title: X component
items.description: X component of the vector, in mm/s

items.title: Y component
items.description: Y component of the vector, in mm/s

items.title: Z component
items.description: Z component of the vector, in mm/s

versionMap.description: Object mapping string identifiers to version numbers in no particular format

versionNumber.title: Version
versionNumber.description: Version number in major.minor.patch format; minor and patch versions are optional

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp that denotes the time the weather information applies to

code.title: Weather condition code
code.description: Numeric weather condition code according to OpenWeatherMap conventions

sunrise.title: Sunrise
sunrise.description: Time of sunrise; negative if the Sun does not rise on the given day

sunset.title: Sunset
sunset.description: Time of sunset; negative if the Sun does not set on the given day

feelsLike.title: Feels like
feelsLike.description: Temperature, in kelvin, adjusted for human perception of weather

pressure.title: Pressure
pressure.description: Atmospheric pressure on the sea level, in Pa

dewPoint.title: Dew point
dewPoint.description: Atmospheric temperature in 1/10th kelvin below which water droplets begin to condense and dew can form

windDirection.title: Wind direction
windDirection.description: Meteorological wind direction, in 1/10th degrees clockwise from due North

weatherStationIdList.title: Weather station IDs
weatherStationIdList.description: IDs of the weather stations that the message refers to
